titleStmt.title: SII 35.27: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 27. (A.R. No. 63 of 1952-53.) SAVAṆŪR, BANKAPUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab lying on the tank bund outside the village.
This damaged inscription which refers itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama year 5, Raudri, Chaitra • • • Sunday [Vyati]pāta. The date is irregular.

It registers a gift of land made into the hands of the two hundred Mahājanas of the agrahāra of Savaṇūr headed by Daṇḍanāyaka Kēsimayya, possibly by the Paṭṭaṇādhipati of rājadhāni Baṅkāpura, when Mahāpradhāna Hērisandhivigrahi Daṇḍanāyaka (name lost) a faithful warrior (Pēshaṇa-Hanumān) of Vīra-Noḷaṁba-Pallava Permānaḍi, was governing the agrahāra of Savaṇūr. Sāntaḷige-Thousand and Nāgarakhaṇḍa-Seventy which comprised a kaṁpaṇa of Banavāsinaḍu. Pergaḍe Siṁgimayya wrote the record with chalk on the stone and Rēvavōja incised it.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
[jayatyāviṣkṛtaṁviṣṇō¨rvvārāhaṁkṣōbhitā¨rṇnava dakṣi
[ṇnōnnatadaṁṣṭrāgra viśrāntabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ gaṇapatē namaḥ
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrī prithvivallabhaṁ mahārā
jādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷati
ḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijaya
rājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhiprava¨rddhamānamānamācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ
saluttamire tatpādapadmōpa
mācālyukavikhyāta ya
rājaparamēśva kri raṇa
rakṣā kāmana tri
gajaṁgarādi ma rāya naṇna
ya rā viya tatpādapadmō
jīvi . samadigatapaṁcamahāśabdamahāsāmantādhipati mahāpra
caṇḍadaṇḍanāyakaṁ ripudēva kāyaṁ gōtrapavitra jagadēkama
vanāṁ hā ṁra satyaratnākara brahaspatisaucya
brati kaḷaguṇa bhaya santāpa śrīmanma
lla vīranoḷaṁbapallava pe¨rmmāḍi jayasiṁhadēva pēsaṇa
hanu
gallu baḷakṛtānta śrīmanmahāpradhāna hērisandhivigrahi daṇḍanāya
ka Agrahāraṁ savaṇūruṁ sāntaḷigesāsiramuṁ banavāsināḍa kaṁpa
ṇa ttu nāgarakhaṇḍa 70 ttu Avanītumaṁ duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭapra
ḷdarusageyyuttamire . vṛtta . vatiyaṁ bāḍappa
mapasivaśandikki ḷita yyana narā
geya koṇḍamiya yiṁ bṛhananvayadoḷ pratāpa
di¨rddana¨rkkasaḷeyāṁvaḷadoḷ nelasi¨rddamāḷeyi . svastiyama
niyama svādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭāṇajapasamādhiśīḷasaṁppa
nnarappa śrīmadagrahāraṁ savaṇūroḍeya pramukha mahājanavinnū
¨rvvaru . ka . jagamaṁ bāsaṇisida teṁpagalade nelasi¨rddasācasanāḍuradiḷaya
tageyada vīratanu bageyillada nanniyiṟuga ninagivu sahaja .
Arirāya madana saṁbaranire kā ḷi prabhu ra
ka mahēsvara rājadhāni
baṁkāpurada Aṣṭadasapaṭṭaṇa paṭṭisāliga gāvuṇḍanna
lliya paṭṭaṇādhipati prabhu ṭṭeya śrīmaddaṇḍanāyakaṁ kēsima
yya pramukhamahājanavinnū¨rvvaruṁkeyoḷ sa¨rvvabādhāparihāramāgi paḍe
para koladamānyaṁ śrīmaccāḷukya vi
kramakāla 5 neya raudrisaṁvatsara caitra pāta Ādi
vāradaṁdu śatrakke
vinnū¨rvvaruṁ caṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ
pāḷisida¨rgge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētradoḷ
takarapparu . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundarā ṣaṣṭi¨rvvariṣasahaśrāṇi
viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . pe¨rggaḍesiṁgimayya sivapādapaṁkajabhramaraṁ baredaṁ
lakṣaṇamaṁ baḷpade sa¨rggaṇamāntanakkaradoḷage khaṇḍarisalu viśvakalvesaṁ
meccisalu rēvavōjana guṇake maccaramuṁṭe jagadoḷage .
Digital edition of SII 35.27 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
